description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior is predominantly white with large, horizontal windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. A central open courtyard with greenery and a tree is visible, surrounded by glass walls that connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The house features a spacious patio area with a tiled surface adjacent to the courtyard, ideal for outdoor activities. The main entrance is simple and flush with the facade, lacking ornate details, and there is a garage integrated into the structure. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and a central open courtyard with greenery. Features include a spacious patio, integrated garage, and minimalist entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a glimpse of the central courtyard with greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass-walled courtyard, patio area, and the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage entrance, tiled patio, and the enclosed courtyard with a tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the solid exterior wall, horizontal window, and partial view of the interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows and glass walls around the courtyard
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist flush entry with a simple door, no steps or porch, and clean lines
